completed_tasks.name: Phase 1: Platform Foundation — all 4 plans complete
TAXII collection 'MITRE ATT&CK' created in OpenCTI UI

remaining_tasks.name: Plan Phase 3: AI IOC Extraction (parallel with Phase 2)
Obtain AlienVault OTX free API key (needed before Phase 2 execution)

human_actions_pending.action: Obtain AlienVault OTX free API key from otx.alienvault.com (free account)
human_actions_pending.context: Required for FEED-03 in Phase 2. Free tier covers the IOC feed needed for demo. Can plan Phase 2 without it but cannot execute the OTX feed task until key is in hand.

decisions.rationale: Only Python + pgrep available in opencti/worker:6.4.0 image; process-presence check is sufficient for DEPL-04

decisions.decision: TAXII collection filter: Entity type = Attack Pattern (not 'Pattern')
decisions.rationale: 'Pattern' in OpenCTI refers to STIX Indicator detection patterns (Sigma/YARA); 'Attack Pattern' entity type targets MITRE ATT&CK techniques

decisions.decision: TAXII raw JSON is correct behavior
decisions.rationale: TAXII 2.1 is a machine-to-machine protocol; raw JSON response is the STIX 2.1 bundle format consumed by threat intel tools
Phase 3 (AI Extraction) depends only on Phase 1; no dependency on Phase 2. Parallel planning saves time.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 2 to plan Feed Ingestion Pipeline, then /gsd-plan-phase 3 to plan AI IOC Extraction (both can be planned in the same session in parallel).
context_notes: Phase 1 is fully closed and verified. Platform is healthy and running (9/9 services). 709 ATT&CK patterns in OpenCTI. TAXII endpoint live with MITRE ATT&CK collection. Ollama models ready (llama3.2:3b + nomic-embed-text). The platform is stable enough to leave running between sessions. Phase 2 and Phase 3 are both unblocked by Phase 1 completion. The only soft pre-req for Phase 2 execution is the OTX API key.
